scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix Barcode-1 && npm install --prefix "Legal mapping" && npm install --prefix "legal pro/AI Legal Portal" && npm install --prefix dashboard
scripts.dev:ai: npm run dev --prefix "legal pro/AI Legal Portal"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --hide "barcode,mapping,ai,backend,coverletter" --kill-others -n "portal,barcode,mapping,ai,dashboard,backend,coverletter" "npm run dev:portal" "npm run dev:barcode" "npm run dev:mapping" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:coverletter"
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/dashboard dist/mapping dist/barcode dist/coverletter && npm run build --prefix dashboard && cp -r dashboard/dist/* dist/dashboard/ && npm run build --prefix "Legal mapping" && cp -r "Legal mapping"/dist/* dist/mapping/ && cd Barcode-1 && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && cp -r Barcode-1/.next/static dist/barcode/static && cp -r Barcode-1/public/* dist/barcode/ && cp index.html dist/
